历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 science/physics category minimum rankings approximately 10576 → 13724 → 16525 → 16100, with a continuous significant decline of about 5949 places from 2022 to 2024, a slight recovery of about 425 places in 2025, and a 2025 baseline of about 16100; provincial science/physics category enrollment plan: 44 in 2022, 42 in 2023, 43 in 2024, 45 in 2025; 2026 plan 45, unchanged from 2025, no expansion to ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 80th (2026), stable in the 79–83 range in recent years, a mid-to-upper tier strong polytechnic university; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (students plagiarizing works for competitions, expelling students for academic misconduct), with a mild dampening effect on application enthusiasm; in 2025, there were signals of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors, but the Xuancheng Campus shares reputation with the main campus, overall impact limited; Management Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline, consistent with the university's strong engineering positioning; computer, mechanical, electrical and other engineering majors, though not individually rated A-class, rely on the main campus's engineering heritage, still strongly attractive to science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 Inner Mongolia physics category candidates approximately 110,880 (estimated by historical ratio), an increase of about 32.5% from 83,716 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Xuancheng, Anhui, not a popular region, with relatively limited appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight upward trend in historical rankings in 2025, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase of about 32.5% in provincial physics category candidates leading to intensified competition, and a slightly negative reputation with mild dampening effect, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to move slightly forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 15800, range 15300–16300.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 15300), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors; if your ranking is close to the upper bound (e.g., 16300), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 80th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026).
